nodes.context: New York City Mafia family; DeMeo was a member and headed the DeMeo crew.
Criminal group led by Roy DeMeo, involved in murder, car theft, drug dealing, prostitution, and pornography.
New York City Mafia family; DeMeo was initially an associate of its Brooklyn faction.
Irish-American gang based in Hell's Kitchen, allied with the Gambino family.
New York City Mafia family; underboss Salvatore Vitale claimed to have delivered a corpse to DeMeo in 1974.
New York City Mafia family; DeMeo was a member and headed the DeMeo crew.
Criminal group led by Roy DeMeo, involved in murder, car theft, drug dealing, prostitution, and pornography.
New York City Mafia family; soldier Ralph Scopo was a member.
New York City Mafia family; underboss Anthony Casso was a member.

edges.evidence_quote: Roy Albert DeMeo ... was an American mobster in the Gambino crime family of New York City. He headed a group known as the 'DeMeo crew'.
edges.context: The DeMeo crew operated under the Gambino crime family, with DeMeo as a made member.

edges.evidence_quote: DeMeo was initially an associate of the Brooklyn faction of the Lucchese crime family
edges.context: DeMeo was initially associated with the Lucchese family before shifting allegiance.

edges.evidence_quote: DeMeo secured his induction into the Gambino family by forming an alliance with an Irish-American gang known as the Westies
edges.context: The Westies became a de facto arm of the Gambino family, sharing profits and taking murder contracts.

edges.evidence_quote: DeMeo secured his induction into the Gambino family by forming an alliance with an Irish-American gang known as the Westies
edges.context: DeMeo formed an alliance with the Westies, which helped him become a made member.

edges.evidence_quote: Bonanno family underboss Salvatore Vitale claimed to the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) that in 1974 he was ordered to deliver the corpse of a man who had just been murdered to a garage in Queens so that it could be disposed of by DeMeo.
edges.context: The Bonanno family delivered a corpse to the DeMeo crew for disposal.

edges.evidence_quote: Roy Albert DeMeo was an American mobster in the Gambino crime family of New York City. He headed a group known as the "DeMeo crew"
edges.context: The DeMeo crew was a subunit of the Gambino crime family.

edges.evidence_quote: Casso ordered them to kill DeMeo, assuring them that there would be no retribution and that afterwards they would join him in the Lucchese family.
edges.context: Lucchese family underboss Casso ordered DeMeo crew members to kill DeMeo and promised them membership in the Lucchese family.
